IMessage interface

Defines a message format.

{IMessage}

Signature:

export interface IMessage

Property

Modifiers

Type

Description

delay?

number

(Optional) Message delay in milliseconds (for delayed messages). Optional.

{number}

from

string

{string}

id

string

{string}

message
